operator_notes: Residual limitations remain explicit inputs into promotion and continuation review.
The first live stack is intentionally constrained rather than pretending to be final.

limitations.title: IBKR market-data dependency
limitations.summary: IBKR market data remains an operational dependency and is not a premium low-latency feed.
limitations.objective_rationale: Acceptable for honest validation and safe operation because v1 values operational truth over feed sophistication.
limitations.expansion_guardrail: A second feed is only eligible after live diagnostics prove IBKR data is insufficient.
notes: Do not silently normalize this limitation away in later review.

limitations.title: 1OZ liquidity heterogeneity
limitations.summary: 1OZ liquidity varies materially by session and can constrain viable strategy classes.
limitations.objective_rationale: Acceptable in v1 only because the lane is about proving tradability honestly before widening scope.
limitations.expansion_guardrail: Symbol expansion or symbol switch requires continuation-review evidence from tradability studies.
notes: Liquidity assumptions must stay explicit in continuation review.

limitations.title: Bar-based microstructure gap
limitations.summary: Bar-based logic will miss depth-sensitive and microstructure-dependent opportunities.
limitations.objective_rationale: Acceptable for v1 because the initial objective is safe and honest validation, not microstructure capture.
limitations.expansion_guardrail: Sub-minute or depth-aware live logic requires a deliberate continuation-review redesign.
notes: This is a deliberate limitation, not a forgotten roadmap item.

limitations.title: Minimum live capital posture limit
limitations.summary: The approved $5,000 / one-1OZ posture caps absolute-dollar opportunity in the initial stack.
limitations.objective_rationale: Acceptable for v1 because the stack is proving safe operation at small size before any capital expansion.
limitations.expansion_guardrail: Raising capital posture requires continuation review and measured evidence that the lane is worth scaling.
notes: The small capital posture is a deliberate throttle, not a hidden permanent limit.

limitations.title: Overnight operational risk
limitations.summary: Overnight operation is riskier and operationally stricter than intraday-flat operation.
limitations.objective_rationale: Acceptable in v1 because safety requires stricter overnight gating rather than optimistic expansion.
limitations.expansion_guardrail: Overnight scope only expands after continuation review confirms overnight evidence remains acceptable.
notes: Overnight remains explicitly stricter than intraday-flat.

limitations.title: Single-host infrastructure concentration
limitations.summary: Single-host operation concentrates infrastructure risk even with guardian and off-host durability.
limitations.objective_rationale: Acceptable for the initial objective because the first live lane values simplicity and recovery drills over premature multi-host complexity.
limitations.expansion_guardrail: Multi-host infrastructure only becomes eligible when continuation review shows one-host SLOs are insufficient.
notes: One-host posture is acceptable only because it remains explicit and reviewable.
